utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes , you got something from the Screen Actor Guild .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ooh , it is probably a residual check , hey can you open it for me , I am kinda ...

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hmm that is weird . I do not remember being in a move called benefits lapsed .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , it is not a check . They are saying your health insurance expired because , you did not work enough last year .

utterances.speaker: Joey

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: When I had insurance I could get hit by a bus or catch on fire , you know ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am sorry man , there is never a good time to stop catching on fire .
